title: Touhou - Kira's Fangame Collection
description:
This collection contains 6 Touhou fangames developed by Kira - Games&Stuff, all of them playable on local couch play. While they don't have lan/online mode, you can use Steam's remote play together feature to play with your friends remotely. Also if any of the music sounds familiar, every game has its own music room where you unlock melodies as you play, revealing the title and artist who made them to make it easier to find them online.

TOUHOU TRAP WORLDA 2D platformer where players must traverse different worlds filled with traps created by Yukari Yakumo, where every wrong move matters. Play co-op with your friends or take on the challenges on your own.

-40 levels

-8 playable characters

-Co-op up to 8 players at once

-music room

TOUHOU MEMORIES OF THE PASTA 2D adventure featuring Reimu as the main character, who receives a strange threatening letter from someone whose plan is to bring numerous youkai back to Gensokyo to cause chaos. With the help of her friend Marisa, they will travel through different locations of Gensokyo in search of the sender, recruiting other iconic characters to aid them on their adventure.

-17 worlds

-5 playable characters

-Co-op up to 2 players at once

-music room

TOUHOU INCIDENT AT THE SHRINESA 2D adventure featuring Sanae as the main character, who is investigating a strange explosion that happened somewhere in Gensokyo. Under Suwako's orders, she will travel alongside other characters searching for who or what caused that explosion. 

-15 worlds

-4 playable characters

-Co-op up to 4 players at once

-music room

Buy upgrades at Nitori's shop that will help you on your adventure!

Challenge some NPC to a boss fight on mission mode to earn some extra graze!

TOUHOU REIMARI TACTICSNitori made a device that allows Gensokyo's people to play an online game called "ReiMari Tactics", a 2D top-down tower defense shooter where the player has to stop enemies from reaching the player's base before it's too late. Marisa invites Reimu to come over her place to play with her and try to claim the price for being the first on beating the game. 

-5 worlds

-4 playable characters

-Co-op up to 4 players at once

-music room

Buy upgrades at Nitori's shop that will help you if you get stuck on a stage.

TOUHOU TREASURE HUNTER FAIRIESA 3D stealth game featuring Cirno as the main character. A race was held in the Fairy's Forest, in which our dear Cirno came in last. Her punishment is to travel to different locations in Gensokyo to collect certain items while the other fairies try to catch her, if they succeed, you lose. On co-op mode, a second player will join as Daiyousei and both must be caught to lose.

-10 levels

-2 playable characters

-Co-op up to 2 players at once

-music room

TOUHOU THE GREAT TORI MAZEA 2D metroidvania featuring Reimu and Marisa as the main characters. Reimu, unconscious, is awakened by an unknown voice that tells her to follow it. Upon doing so, she finds her friend Marisa petrified, and beside her a mysterious character who tells her that a very powerful necromancer is petrifying the people of Gensokyo. This mysterious character, with her powers, unpetrifies Marisa and ask both of them for their help to stop the necromancer.

-9 worlds

-2 playable characters

-Co-op up to 2 players at once

-music room

Buy upgrades at Tyra's shop that will unlock different stuff for your adventure.

A WORD FROM THE DEVELOPERMy first encounter with the Touhou Project series was the song "Bad Apple". From then on, I became curious about its characters, games, music... I never expected to find such a wonderful world that would become my favorite game series captivating me to the point of wanting to pay tribute to it by creating my own fan games.

Ten years ago, I started tinkering with game programming, trying out different genres, and ended up creating 6 fan games for this series. Now, for the tenth anniversary, I decided to compile them all into a single collection with improvements and additions.

This collection can be enjoyed by anyone who likes 2D/3D action games, although if you're familiar with the series, you'll probably enjoy it even more.

Lastly, I want to give special recognition to ZUN, the original creator of Touhou Project, for his incredible work and for introducing us to the wonderful universe of Gensokyo. All rights are reserved to him, this fan work was made by fans for fans for free with no copyright infringement intended.
description_short: A collection of 6 in 1 free to play fangames based on the Touhou Project! Play as Reimu and other iconic characters in these couch co-op adventures that include genres such as platforming, metroidvania, tower defense and 3D stealth!
